$comment: RubyMIK update manifest served at https://rubymik.com/version.json. Updated by scripts/release.sh on each release. P38 contract.
notes: 1.1.7 — patch: remote provisioning no longer dead-ends at the key handoff. Provision → Mode A (remote) now ends with a "Finish adoption" panel that registers the router's printed RUBYMIK_PUBKEY directly onto the reserved hub peer; a provisioned-but-not-adopted router shows in Remote Access as "awaiting key" (never vanishes); and each peer shows its hub-side handshake state with a "no handshake yet" hint naming the two real causes (key not registered, or host firewall/port mismatch). No migration (schema unchanged). See the changelog.
